title: Paper Rustling 01.wav
author: swidmark
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Real-paper foley (someone flipping through papers) — fits the 'real paper movement, not synth' constraint. ~13s source; loopable. Inside apply-sfx.mjs, take a 2-4s clean stretch (avoid the louder page-snaps) and normalize to -30 dB.
